shortDescription.default: Preview and edit BPMN process diagrams and engineering files directly in SharePoint

longDescription.default:
Open BPMN process diagrams and diagrams.net drawings directly inside SharePoint document libraries — no downloads, no external apps. Select any supported file and click 'Open BPMN' or 'Open DrawIO' in the command bar to launch a full-featured in-page editor.

After installation, the 'File Preview Admin' button appears at the bottom of any SharePoint site where you are an administrator. Click it to configure which file types are enabled for your tenant.

Alternatively, open settings at any time by navigating to:
https://[YourTenant].sharepoint.com/?m365FilePreviewAdmin=1

Full setup guide: https://evolvegs.ca/file-preview/setup

features.title: File Preview Command Set
features.description: Deploys the document-library preview command and tenant admin page.
